creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
I don't think this can be fixed sanely currently. The problem stems from that IM-nox11 manualy WITHOUT_X11 and texlive-base doesn't have a idea that this happened. There is currently no way to notify texlive-base about this unless the user sets WITHOUT_X11 in /etc/make.conf

When support, for what currently has the work in progress named FLAVOURS for ports. Texlive-base will require any ghostscript and IM-nox11 specificly wants the gs-nox11 version. So the system decides to use the nox11 version then.

* assuming here that texlive doesn't care which version of gs it gets.
